name: srdf
description: MoveIt2 SRDF generation, validation, and planning-semantics workflow. Use when creating, editing, regenerating, inspecting, or validating `.srdf` files, `gen_srdf()` sources, MoveIt planning groups, virtual joints, passive joints, end effectors, group states, disabled collisions, URDF-linked planning semantics, or SRDF handoff for live review. Use the URDF skill for robot structure, the SDF skill for simulator descriptions, and the cad-viewer skill for rendering, live review links, and optional
author: earthtojake
summary_zh: 用于创建和校验 MoveIt2 的 SRDF 文件，处理规划组、虚拟关节、末端执行器、碰撞禁用等规划语义配置，适合需要生成或调试机器人运动规划描述的场景。
